summary: Clean soundboard capture of a solid Red Rocks set featuring Cold Rain, High Time and Tons of Steel.
review: The recording is notably clear with minimal audience bleed, though the Round/Round segment loses a bit of life. The performance is a reliable one – highlights include the Cold Rain opener, a soaring High Time, and Brent‑My­dland’s standout work on Tons of Steel, all wrapped up by Jerry’s warm goodnight at the encore.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews praise a clean recording and solid show highlights, yielding a good‑to‑great overall impression; minor criticisms keep the rating from higher tiers.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clean clarity with very low audience noise; slight dullness on the Round/Round transition but otherwise crisp and well‑balanced.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Smooth set flow with a quiet, tasteful transition from the GDTRFB segment into Round/Round; the second half builds nicely toward an emotional encore.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Gives a heartfelt goodnight at the encore.
band_member_comments.Bob: Bob’s vocal on Little Red Rooster is highlighted.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland’s keyboards shine during Tons of Steel.
